issues.issue: Types in 'with' clause of public package section is not used.
Communication_Properties in 'with' clause of public package section is a predeclared property set and is not needed.
The variable 'e' on the left side of equation is of type 'real' but must be of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl'
left side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
right side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
